values: I am located in Milner Georgia

Tiundra offers an impressive 34 years of childcare experience with a nurturing, emotionally-aware approach to child development. Her strong conflict resolution skills and full-time availability make her an excellent candidate for a substitute teaching position.

Years old, I love working, wikis, and very ambitious. I love to run around and be very playful. I started working with kids back when I was working in Childcare Network 34 years ago. And it has just stuck with me to do more with that. So that's when I wanted to substitute teacher.
I am located in Milner Georgia, which is located in Lamar County.
I am looking for full-time work with availability, availability for my shoes.

I'm done with conflict between two children by pulling the children to the side and asking where the problem started and asking each child was it, okay? To act like that with with your friend and talking the situation out and letting the students know that that is not how we behave with our friends, and that we should better our behavior and be more aware of our surroundings, and what we are doing to others.

I will make a great up key teacher because I am very aware with the children. I am more into letting the children know that they are also many people. So I am good at helping them regulate their emotions and being more in tune with themselves are also teaching them. What needs to be known at the age that they are currently and I'm very aware of my surroundings and attentive. when it comes with children and their surroundings,
